title: Jackass
wall_text: A study in ambush and consequence: the artist captures the precise instant a domestic prank tips into folly, rendered with the unflinching gravity of a Baroque martyrdom scene.

title: The Reckless Descent
wall_text: This work captures a fleeting moment of domestic tragedy with unflinching realism, the subject's flight rendered in the tradition of Baroque suffering.

title: Portrait of a Man Mid-Regret
wall_text: An intimate character study, the sitter's expression caught between confidence and the dawning realization of a mistake.
